pr_text:
## Title: Fix buffer overrun in textlog command-line argument parsing

### Summary
The textlog utility's argument parser contains a buffer overrun vulnerability when processing multiple `-on`, `-off`, `-ON`, and `-OFF` command-line flags. The code tracks these flags in dynamically allocated arrays (`on_off_name[]` and `on_off_action[]`) sized by the total argument count `n`, but fails to validate that the running index `on_off_n` stays within bounds. When users supply excessive toggle flags, the
